ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the facility */,
  "aka_name" TEXT /* Also known as (alternative name) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the facility is located */,
  "dba_name" TEXT /* Doing business as name */,
  "facility_type" INTEGER /* ID of the facility type */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location in geo-coordinate format */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the facility is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the facility */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the facility */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for the facility */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_scheduled_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled inspection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the facility */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the facility record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the facility record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_facility_type FOREIGN KEY ("facility_type") REFERENCES facility_types ("facility_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility inspected */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the inspection */,
  "inspection_type" INTEGER /* ID of the inspection type */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the inspection */,
  "risk" INTEGER /* ID of the risk level */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who conducted the inspection */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes from the inspector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inspection record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inspection record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_inspection_type FOREIGN KEY ("inspection_type") REFERENCES inspection_types ("inspection_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_risk FOREIGN KEY ("risk") REFERENCES risk_levels ("risk_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violations" (
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violation */,
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspection where the violation was found */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the violation */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the violation */,
  "corrected" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the violation has been corrected */,
  "correction_date" TEXT /* Date when the violation was corrected */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the violation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the violation record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_inspection_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspection_id") REFERENCES inspections ("inspection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_types" (
  "facility_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the facility type */,
  "inspection_frequency" TEXT /* Recommended frequency of inspections for this type of facility */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the facility type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the facility type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspection_types" (
  "inspection_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of inspection */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type of inspection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type of inspection */,
  "required_equipment" TEXT /* Equipment required for this type of inspection */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Average duration of this type of inspection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inspection type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inspection type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_levels" (
  "risk_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk level */,
  "risk_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk level */,
  "action_required" TEXT /* Actions required for facilities at this risk level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the risk level record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the risk level record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., inspector, supervisor, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
